message: Cargo security status must be known before declaring shipment ready to fly.
Passenger aircraft cargo requires passenger-eligible screened/secured status.
Not secured cargo is not ready for uplift until screening/security process is completed.

applies_to: EU inbound cargo from third-country airport
message: EU-bound third-country cargo requires ACC3/secure supply-chain/screening validation.
Advance cargo information must be complete for PLACI-regulated lanes.
Secured cargo should have CSD/equivalent audit trail showing who secured it, when and how.
Valuable/vulnerable cargo needs secure storage and chain-of-custody confirmation.
Security matrix is advisory; station/carrier security confirmation is required for special cargo.
